description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §2.1.

Work:
- build_fn_signature native branch: append `cont: i64` as last param (replacing trailing host_ctx position semantically; host_ctx still passed if needs_host_ctx, but cont is now the slot the new ABI mandates).
- Entry harness binds the cont SSA value.
- Cont is passed through but not yet consumed by Return/Halt/Call lowering (those follow in .1.b–.1.d).

Acceptance:
- Native-tier fn (e.g. count_s3) signature in clif dump is `(... , i64) tail` with the trailing i64 being cont.
- Full suite green (behavior unchanged: cont threaded but unused).
title: fz-cps.1.a: cont as last native-sig param
